TERMS & CONDITIONS

Last updated: 02/06/2026

By accessing and using this website, you agree to be bound by the following Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please discontinue use of the website.

1. Use of the Website
This website is provided for general information, room browsing, and access to our booking engine. You agree not to misuse the website, attempt unauthorized access, or engage in any activity that may disrupt its operation.

2. Intellectual Property
All content on this website—including text, images, logos, and design—is the property of the hotel or its content providers. You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute any content without written permission.

3. Accuracy of Information & Visual Representations
We strive to ensure all information, room descriptions, and promotional imagery are accurate and up to date. However, room graphics, photography, and online walkthroughs are intended solely as stylistic, illustrative guides. 

Actual room configurations, furniture placement, view angles, and interior fixtures may vary or change due to operational requirements, seasonal adjustments, or maintenance updates. Sukajadi Hotel & Convention is not liable for minor variations between website photography and the physical room layout, and such adjustments do not constitute a failure of responsibility on behalf of the hotel management. All room rates and structural availability remain subject to change without notice.

4. External Links
This website may contain links to third‑party websites, including our booking engine. We are not responsible for the content, policies, or actions of external sites.

5. Limitation of Liability
We are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of this website, including service interruptions, errors, or data loss.

6. Governing Law
These Terms & Conditions are governed by the laws of **Indonesia**. Any disputes shall be resolved in the appropriate courts of Indonesia.

7. Changes to Terms
We may update these Terms & Conditions at any time. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.


---

PRIVACY POLICY

We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you use our website.

1. Information We Collect
We may collect:
- Information you provide voluntarily (e.g., contact forms, newsletter sign‑ups)  
- Technical data such as IP address, browser type, and pages visited  
- Booking information entered through our booking engine (handled by our booking partner)

2. How We Use Your Information
We use your information to:
- Respond to enquiries  
- Improve website performance  
- Process reservations (via our booking partner)  
- Communicate important updates or promotions (only with consent)

3. Sharing of Information
We do not sell or rent your personal data. Information may be shared only with:
- Our booking engine provider  
- Service providers who support website operations  
- Authorities when required by law

4. Data Security
We implement reasonable security measures to protect your data. However, no online transmission is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute protection.

5. Cookies
This website uses cookies to improve user experience. For more details, please refer to our Cookie Policy.

6. Your Rights
Depending on your jurisdiction, you may request:
- Access to your data  
- Correction of inaccurate information  
- Deletion of your data  
- Withdrawal of consent  


---

COOKIE POLICY

This website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience.

1. What Are Cookies?
Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site function properly and improve performance.

2. Types of Cookies We Use
- **Essential cookies** – required for basic website functionality  
- **Performance cookies** – help us understand how visitors use the site  
- **Functionality cookies** – remember your preferences  
- **Third‑party cookies** – used by analytics tools or embedded services

3. Managing Cookies
You can control or delete cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.

4. Third‑Party Services
Our booking engine and analytics providers may use their own cookies. We do not control these cookies.
